author: lOrm
content: FORBIDDEN: src/tools/bash/* is on the locked file list for this bulk pass. spawn/get_output/kill returning Result<_, String> at mod.rs:54,173,230 forces consumers to substring-match error messages. Mandated refactor (introduce ShellError enum via thiserror, return Result<_, ShellError>, update tests to match variants) stands for a bash-focused worktree.
